contentStructures: Cover: one strong headline and one category label.
Story: compact headline, short body, optional caption.
Closing: summary or call-to-action without sounding pushy.
goodExamples: A concise observation grounded in the product, brand, or context.
badExamples: A vague lifestyle claim with no concrete detail.
imageRules: Respect the selected focus direction: center, top, bottom, left, or right.
Do not invent visual details that are not provided by the user.
ctaRules: Use quiet CTAs only when the user asks for one.
